course_title: APPLIED ECONOMETRICS OF RESOURCE AND ENERGY DEMAND
description: The estimation of the economic models of resource and energy demand, including evaluation of energy and resource programs, estimating demand systems in the study of dynamic pricing models, estimating discrete choice models, forecasting resource and energy demand from econometric models, and topics in the application of big-data analytics in resource and energy demand analysis.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: A A E 636and declared in Agricultural  Applied Economics: Resource and Energy Demand Analysis
